title: Deepslate Alignment
description: This Mods Adds consistent crafting recipes for deepslate and cobbled deepslate, aligning them with their stone counterparts.
body:
### 📘 What Does Our Mod Add:
> Our mod introduces consistent crafting recipes for deepslate and cobbled deepslate, ensuring they align with their stone counterparts in Minecraft. This means that crafting with deepslate will follow the same patterns and logic as regular stone, providing a more intuitive and cohesive experience for players.

### 😀Why should you download our mod:
> Download our mod to streamline your crafting experience in Minecraft. With consistent recipes for deepslate and cobbled deepslate, you can avoid confusion and enjoy smoother gameplay. Plus, our mod works seamlessly with regular Minecraft, so you can keep playing without any problems. Say goodbye to confusion and hello to easier crafting with our mod!
